description_long: This is a low-poly stylized adult female pedestrian figure with a simplified, geometric body structure. She has a sleeveless top, fitted shorts, and tall boots, with gloves covering her hands. The figure's head is oval-shaped with minimal facial features, and her hair is styled in a short, voluminous bob. The arms and legs are elongated and angular, contributing to the stylized appearance. The overall design is minimalistic, with clear color blocking and no visible accessories or carried objects.
description: A stylized adult female pedestrian with a sleeveless top, shorts, tall boots, gloves, and a short bob hairstyle. The figure is low-poly and geometric, with minimal facial features and no accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sleeveless top, shorts, gloves, boots, and the symmetrical, stylized body shape.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the bob hairstyle, and the angular contours of the torso and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the fitted top, shorts, and the back of the boots, with arms hanging straight down.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the face, hairstyle, and the side silhouette of the body and limbs.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top, high-waisted shorts, tall boots, gloves
